scripts.setup: npm install && npm run setup:backend && npm run setup:frontend && npm run build
scripts.setup:backend: cd backend && npm install && npx prisma generate
scripts.dev: npm run kill:3000 && concurrently -k -n BACKEND,FRONTEND,ELECTRON -c green,blue,yellow "npm run dev:backend" "npm run dev:frontend" "npm run dev:electron"
scripts.build: npm run build:frontend && npm run build:backend
scripts.package: cross-env WIN_CSC_LINK= CSC_LINK= CSC_IDENTITY_AUTO_DISCOVERY=false npm run clean && npm run build && electron-builder
